calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-25-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Clifford Y. Wang, Esq. appeared with petitioner Hoa Cam Lol, who was placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Kelvin Hoa-Cam Lol.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-25-2010 Granted Per Written Order

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-04-2010 Reset To Mar-25-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Clifford Y. Wang, Esq. appeared for petitioner Hoa Cam Loi, who was not present at today hearing.
Proof of Publication in the file.

As petitioner Hao Cam Loi was not present at today's hearing, this matter is continued to March 25, 2010 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 218. Counsel for petitioner shall submit an Amended Order to Show Cause for Change of Name to the Court.
